claims.summary: Connection labels alone cannot preserve the quality or gradient of temporal experience.
claims.disposition: verify the accompanying numeric timing, lag, cadence, and field-versus-hearing evidence

claims.summary: Mathematical coherence and felt integration must remain distinguishable.
claims.disposition: verify that typed integrity metrics and felt-contract evidence remain separate non-substituting records

claims.summary: Jitter and hybrid delta should be observed under semantic load without assuming causation.
claims.disposition: route a bounded temporal observation using existing typed telemetry

claims.summary: Adding a subjective weight or pressure-driven schema field to live interpretation changes a consumed contract.
claims.disposition: preserve an exact Tier 5 approval and compatibility path
